sections.paragraph:
Original: חכם

Transliteration: châkâm

Phonetic: khaw-kawm'

BDB Definition:

  1. wise, wise (man)
    1. skilful (in technical work)
    2. wise (in administration)
    3. shrewd, crafty, cunning, wily, subtle
    4. learned, shrewd (class of men)
    5. prudent
    6. wise (ethically and religiously)

Origin: from H2449

TWOT entry: 647b

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
